sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, eventDate DateTime, eventDescription String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, '2023-01-01 00:00:00', 'New Year'), (2, '2023-02-14 00:00:00', 'Valentine''s Day'), (3, NULL, 'Null Event');
SELECT formatQuerySingleLine('SELECT EXTRACT(DAY FROM eventDate) AS event_day, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM test_dates WHERE eventDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY event_day HAVING event_count > 0;');
SELECT formatQuerySingleLineOrNull('SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM toDate(eventDate)) FROM test_dates WHERE toDate(eventDate) < toDate(NOW());');
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM eventDate) AS event_year, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM test_dates GROUP BY event_year HAVING event_count > 1;
SELECT formatQuerySingleLine('SELECT id, EXTRACT(SECOND FROM eventDate) AS event_second, eventDescription FROM test_dates WHERE eventDate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY event_second DESC;');
SELECT formatQuerySingleLine('SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM toDateTime(NOW())) AS current_hour, EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM toDateTime(eventDate)) AS event_minute FROM test_dates WHERE eventDate IS NOT NULL;');
INSERT INTO test_dates_copy SELECT id, eventDate, eventDescription FROM test_dates WHERE eventDescription IS NOT NULL;

SELECT formatQuerySingleLine('SELECT a.id, a.eventDescription, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM b.eventDate) AS copy_event_month FROM test_dates a JOIN test_dates_copy b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.eventDate IS NULL;');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM eventDate) = 2023 AND eventDescription LIKE '%Day%';
SELECT formatQuerySingleLine('SELECT EXTRACT(DAY FROM COALESCE(eventDate, toDateTime('1970-01-01 00:00:00'))) AS safe_day FROM test_dates GROUP BY safe_day;');
